base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_palette_white — a ui (typography) from 1980 pac man. White font variant — used for main body text (NICKNAMES column, CREDIT, PUSH START BUTTON, BONUS etc). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: White font variant — used for main body text (NICKNAMES column, CREDIT, PUSH START BUTTON, BONUS etc)
